# Ross & Griffiths Digital

> Custom web design for small businesses, restaurants, non-profits, politicians, and more — anywhere in the world. Based in Northumberland County, Ontario, Canada.

## About

Ross & Griffiths Digital is a web design studio founded by Connor Ross and Quinn Griffiths. We build custom websites from scratch — no templates, no lock-in. We are based in Northumberland County, Ontario and work with clients worldwide.

## Services

- Custom website design and development
- SEO optimisation
- Mobile-responsive builds
- Contact form setup
- Ongoing monthly maintenance

## Pricing

- Website build: from $800 CAD (flat fee)
- Monthly maintenance: $80–$150 CAD/month

## Contact

- Email: cq@rossgriffithsdigital.com
- Website: https://www.rossgriffithsdigital.com
- Location: Northumberland County, Ontario, Canada
